text:
Created attachment 196802
[PATCH] security/openvpn-admin: ignore PORTSCOUT

#230060 already updated this port to version 1.9.4-2,
 but PORTSCOUT is still mad.

as one of the last updates on the upstream repo dates from couple years ago,
 I feel safe to just ignore the scout.
